guarantees.1: Your data is yours — export to CSV

howItWorks.title: Get started in 3 steps
howItWorks.subtitle: From zero to your first published form in under 2 minutes.

0.title: Build the form
0.description: Add text, email, date, multiple choice fields and more — all visual, no code.

1.title: Share the link
1.description: Each form gets a unique public link. Share it or embed it on your site.

2.title: Collect responses
2.description: Track everything in the dashboard, get an email on every submission and export to CSV.

useCases.title: What you can use it for
useCases.subtitle: Create any form in minutes. A few ready-made examples to start:

0.title: Contact
0.description: Receive messages and questions straight from your site.

3.title: Order / Quote
3.description: Receive orders and requests via WhatsApp.

5.title: And much more
5.description: Sign-ups, bookings, support and whatever you imagine.

templates.title: Start with a template, publish in minutes
templates.subtitle: Pick a template, tweak the fields your way and generate the public link — no code.
templates.blankDescription: Create a blank form and add the fields you want.

demo.title: See Submitin in action
demo.subtitle: From the builder to the responses dashboard — explore how it works.

form.title: Contact form
form.successSubtitle: Thanks for reaching out. The team has been notified.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.

0.q: Do I need to know how to code?
0.a: No. You build forms visually, adding fields with a few clicks — no code required.

1.a: Yes. You create forms, publish them and collect responses for free — no credit card to get started.

2.q: How long does it take to build a form?
2.a: Less than 2 minutes: pick a ready-made template, tweak the fields and share the link.

3.q: Is my data locked into the platform?
3.a: No. You can export all your responses to CSV at any time.

4.q: Can I integrate with other systems?
4.a: Yes. Use webhooks to automatically send every response to the URL you configure.

5.a: There's per-IP rate limiting on every submission and, on the Pro plan, you can enable CAPTCHA (Cloudflare Turnstile).

formBuilder.guestBanner: You're trying it out without an account. Create a free account to save and publish.

formBuilder.allowMultipleResponsesHelp: Show the "Submit another response" button after submission. Turn off for one response per person.

conversational.help: Show one question at a time, conversation style. Usually increases completion rate.

formBuilder.integrationUrlDesc: Use this URL in Framer or another site to submit responses to this form. Request body must be JSON: { "values": { "Field label": "value", ... } }. Keys must match your field labels.
formBuilder.embedDesc: Copy the code below and paste it into your site's HTML
formBuilder.formSavedPublished: Your form is published and accessible.

conditional.title: Conditional logic
conditional.proHint: Available on the Pro plan — show this field only when another answer matches.
conditional.noFields: Add another field to this form first — conditional logic shows this field based on another field’s answer.
conditional.emptyValue: Enter a value to compare — without it, this rule is ignored and the field always shows.
conditional.needsChoiceField: Add a multiple-choice, yes/no, or rating field first — conditional logic depends on a field with known answers.

schedule.help: Control when this form accepts responses.
schedule.proHint: Available on the Pro plan — schedule open/close dates and a response limit.
schedule.closedMessagePlaceholder: This form is no longer accepting responses.

partials.label: Capture partial responses
partials.help: Save leads who fill in a contact but do not submit.
partials.proHint: Available on the Pro plan — capture leads who start but do not finish.
